title: Uoeo 24 Sets Christmas Christian Gifts Christmas Candy Cane Pen Bulk Jesus Greeting Cards Xmas Pens Merry Christmas Cards Religious Gifts Christian Holiday Favors Xmas Gifts for Church Event Supplies
features: Christmas Cards Set: you will receive 24 Christmas candy cane pens and 24 Christmas religious cards in 4 different styles, 6 of each, ideal combination and enough quantity to meet your gift sending needs, suitable for church theme party and Christmas birthday party. They are also perfect for holiday party favors, and classroom prizes, adding joy and whimsy to every writing task.

Christmas Theme Design: the Xmas pens are crafted in the shape of candy canes with classic Christmas color scheme; Each Christmas pen is red and white twisted designs with black ink and is capped with a white removable cap for easy storage and protection. The Christmas cards carry a classic Christmas pattern on the front, on the reverse, you'll find an enchanting old Christmas tale explaining the meaning behind candy canes; This design is sure to captivate every recipient

Quality Material: the fun Christmas candy cane pens is about 7.68 inches, with bright color, long-lasting performance and are not easy to break, offering comfortable holding and smooth writing experience; The Christmas cards are made of quality paper, not fade and can serve as keepsakes, feature classic Christmas elements such as santa claus, snowman and enchanting old Christmas tale; Sized at about 2.36 x 3.94 inches, they make for a ideal fit with the pens

The Ideal Christmas Party Gift: Our Xmas candy cane pens and cards bulk are great party favors and Christmas goodie bag fillers for Christmas parties, as well as Xmas hanging ornaments, Christmas tree decor, Christmas decorations, Christmas stocking stuffers, and Xmas gifts or presents to your friends, students, coworkers. Beyond Christmas party favors, they are ideal for adding festive flair to classroom activities, office meetings, or everyday note-taking.

Wide Application: the Christmas party gifts are ideal gifts for multiple occasions and can be gifted to various people from family, friends, colleagues, students, to teachers; Whether you're celebrating Christmas, Thanksgiving, a church event, a Bible study session, a birthday, or simply decorating your home, school, or office, this set is a ideal choice. The gifts set is more than stationery they carry the joyful spirit of Christmas and the touching message making them ideal Christmas gifts.
